message:
feat(core): information-theoretic entropy gating pre-filter (ft-344j8.9)

Add EntropyGate that screens terminal output segments before they
reach the ONNX embedding pipeline. Segments with Shannon entropy below
threshold (default 2.0 bits/byte) are skipped, saving CPU on progress
bars, spinners, and repeated characters. Includes GatedAnomalyDetector
that combines entropy gate with conformal prediction detector.
61 unit tests + 40 proptest properties all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
